text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Lucky Umamusume Race is about to start!
Every New Year, this tradition attracts many
fleet-footed runners, and this year is no different.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have a guest runner from Tracen
Academy this year as well. Let's give her a huge
round of applause, everyone!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha ha! Rejoice, one and all! For this
year, the one and only T.M. Opera O is gracing
the stage!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How fortuitous you are to be in my presence, for
today, you shall bear witness to the moment that
I—blessed as I am—become the Lucky
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! It's T.M. Opera O! This might be the year a
guest runner wins first place!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's not happening. Guest runners are
always marked by all of the runners, putting them
at a disadvantage. Plus they aren't used to the
course...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Besides, she's here again this year! From what I heard, she's been training for this race specifically. Oooh, I just know she's going to give us a good show!

text_block_list.name: Semi-Pro Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! Sorry to rain on the parade, but you might
as well forfeit, because victory is going to be
mine again this year!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, now! She must be quite skillful to be so
confident!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A worthy opponent takes the stage... Very well! I
never hold back in a race, and this one will be no
exception!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sparks fly between the two contenders! The sharp
crack of the starter pistol echoes in the chilly
winter air.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Under the watchful eyes of the crowd lined up
along the route, the leader of the pack comes
into view...

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
At the head of the pack is last year's Lucky
Umamusume! Can she hold onto her lead?! It
looks like T.M. Opera O is hot on her heels!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I have you now, my worthy opponent!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child
text_block_list.text: Gyah! Ow! My toe...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm?! Are you all right?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child
text_block_list.text: Sniff... It hurts, but... I'm fine. So go! You're gonna lose if you don't hurry up and run!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hehehehe... Haaah ha ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You're worrying about others even in the midst of
your own pain? What a beautiful, noble heart you
have!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But fret not. It will take more than a brief pause
to snatch victory's crown from my brow!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I leave this child in your capable hands!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: YAAAH!

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what's this?! T.M. Opera O has taken the
lead! She's broken straight through the pack with
a powerful burst of speed!

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
And with a huge lead, T.M. Opera O clinches the
race and becomes this year's Lucky Umamusume!
We've just witnessed the ascension of the
Centurial Lucky Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha ha! Everyone! Say hello to this
year's Lucky Umamusume—yours truly!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You were amazing! I wanna be able to run
just like you someday!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? Well, that's a most worthy and
natural goal, given my outstanding comeback!

text_block_list.name: Semi-Pro Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Not only did she stop to help a child, but she
even won the race... I've been utterly defeated. It
looks like I have a ways to go...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You put up a valiant fight. A protagonist shines
only vis-à-vis a worthy rival. You deserve the
award for the best supporting role!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo!
Congratulations, Centurial Lucky Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come one, come all for a high five from me! Allow
me to share my luck with everyone!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha ha! Haaaaah ha ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
Will you look at that! It's T.M. Opera O! T.M.
Opera O has made her way to the front! Aaaaand
the two of them cross the finish line
simultaneously!

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
A performance worthy of the fastest semi-pro!
She didn't give an inch this year either, folks! And
coming in at a close second is T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! I was a mere step away from victory... Is this
yet another ordeal one must face to become the
top star?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child
text_block_list.text:
Opera O... You were so cool! I've never seen
anyone run like you do!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? Hehe! If I was able to put a smile on
your face, then it was all worth it! I must
commend myself on a job well done!

text_block_list.name: Semi-Pro Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...I won. I'm this year's Lucky Umamusume, but...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on your win! Your display of
strength was worthy of illuminating my grand
stage!

text_block_list.name: Semi-Pro Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on... You're too earnest for your own
good. You helped that kid and still managed to
make an amazing play for first place... You're so
cool it almost hurts.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. But of course I am! I'm guessing by your
words that you too have fallen for my charms.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To think I would be able to capture hearts even in
defeat... Goodness! Does my glamour know no
limit?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The title of Lucky Umamusume has slipped
through T.M. Opera O's fingers, but her gallantry
ensures that she gleams brighter than any star in
the sky!
